About Me
I'm Stevie Cavanagh, a designer with experience in Front-end Web Development. I graduated from Liverpool John Moores University with a 1st Class Honours in Graphic Design and Illustration. Since graduating I have worked in Web Development, UX / UI Design, Print Design, Branding, Logo Design and Illustration.
Get In Touch
Services
Branding

Expertise in Logo Design, crafting Brand Identities as well as creating Branding Guidelines.

UX / UI Design

Design with Front-end Development in HTML5, CSS, jQuery and Javascript.

Graphic Design

Creating Print Publications working with Illustrations, Colour and Typography.

Testimonials
Stevie has been working for us for the past 6 months; designing websites, e-mail campaigns, QR code business cards, presentations, flyers, advert banners and pretty much anything we could throw her way. She has consistently excelled and delivered great work across the board. Even jobs outside of her comfort zone don't seem to ever phase her, as she quickly learns and picks up new skills. She is an asset to have in your team.
JAV Medical Systems 2024
We asked Stevie to create an image to advertise two group exhibitions. She took on all our requirements and was very positive with our feedback. We really love our design and couldn't recommend Stevie enough!
Evocation 2023
Clients

Having gained considerable experience both in-house and as a freelancer, I have worked as a designer on a host of projects with clients using different skill sets over the years. I'm available for freelance projects and collaborations - email me for a chat.

stevie@sc-design.uk
